sources.finding: OpenAI Agents SDK HITL pauses execution for sensitive tool calls until approval/rejection and supports serializing/resuming run state.
OpenAI guardrails guidance says tool validation must be placed next to the tool causing side effects, because manager/workflow boundaries matter.
LangGraph interrupts pause graph execution for external input and surface JSON-serializable interrupt payloads.
Durable execution allows interrupted workflows, including HITL workflows, to resume from recorded state.
OWASP identifies tool abuse and privilege escalation as AI agent security risks.
OWASP recommends user approval for high-impact actions before they occur.
